name: ce-lite
description: Lightweight-delegation variant of compound-engineering. Drops the persistent agent registrations (~58.8k tokens baseline) and converts orchestrator skills to spawn Task subagents on demand from references/agent-prompts/. Auto-regenerated daily from upstream EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin.

plugins.name: ce-lite
plugins.description: Compound-engineering specialists with near-zero baseline context cost. Same agent prompts as upstream CE; loaded only when a slash command needs them. During trial, slash commands are namespaced under /ce-lite:* so the original compound-engineering plugin can be installed alongside for direct comparison.
